questionHtml:
Which is the hierarchy of taxa in order of decreasing numbers of species?

A. domain, phylum, order, family

B. phylum, order, family, class

C. domain, phylum, order, class

D. phylum, class, family, order

meta.title: Which is the hierarchy of taxa in order of decreasing numbers of species? A. domain, phylum, order, family B. phylum, order, family, class C. domain, phylum, order, class D. phylum
